69f2c9c8baa27486f24e1267 description: Friend, have you tried the original Odolbos stim? Nothing compares to the euphoric rush it delivers. I swear I've tried it a dozen times and it's never been the same.
69f2cb14baa27486f24e126b: Kill 6 PMCs under the effects of the Obdolbos stim
69f2cb5f01fd39ae97fc0277 description: Ja, one moment, I will be with you. Now, what was it I had for you? Oh yes, you see those vein illuminators that are so sought after around here? I intercepted a batch of a couple modified ones, direct out of the hands of some ex-Terragroup employees. My convoy was mysteriously intercepted and the package taken off my hands once more. It's being stored in a locked room in the city. See if you can get your hands on it once more.
69f2cbee01fd39ae97fc0280: Find Modified LEDX in the locked X-Ray room on Streets
